mapper.select:
SELECT raa.id, raa.user_id, raa.questionnaire_id, raa.questionnaire_name, raa.total_score, raa.risk_level, raa.risk_level_code, raa.answer_time, raa.duration, raa.ip_address, raa.status, raa.created_at,
ui.NAME AS userName, ui.images AS userImages,
raq.questionnaire_name, raq.questionnaire_version, raq.description, raq.total_score, raq.passing_score FROM risk_assessment_answer raa LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = raa.user_id) LEFT JOIN risk_assessment_questionnaire raq ON (raq.id = raa.questionnaire_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{queryFrom.userId}
AND questionnaire_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.questionnaireName},'%')
ORDER BY aq.created_at DESC
